summary: The four MVP legal draft artifacts exist at the exact frozen paths, are referenced by evidence, keep DRAFT_WAITING_HUMAN_REVIEW/not-approved warnings, preserve aggregate-by-default HR/sponsor reporting, avoid legal approval/real-data approval/guaranteed outcome/personalized-advice claims, and keep legal and real-data human gates open. This verifier did not update latest aliases; parent sync may move them later.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Four exact draft files exist and are referenced in evidence.
Each draft has DRAFT_WAITING_HUMAN_REVIEW, version/date, MVP/B2B scope, owner expectation, human reviewer expectation, production-use limitation and prominent not-approved warning.
Drafts preserve aggregate HR/sponsor reporting by default and do not make personal diagnostic answers, weak zones, exact sums or reflection details personal HR reports by default.
Drafts do not claim legal approval, real-data processing approval, production readiness, guaranteed outcomes/debt relief/savings/risk-free results or personalized investment/tax/credit/legal advice.
acceptance_mapping.note: Candidate lines were manually classified by the verifier; all blocking positive-claim matches were excluded by negative or limiting language.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Cookie/tracking is deferred/out of scope unless active repo implementation proves otherwise.
acceptance_mapping.note: The app/package scan returned no active cookie/tracking implementation matches.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Human gate legal-privacy-consent-wording-and-real-pii-processing remains WAITING_HUMAN with the exact four files named for review.
Full MVP-03, MVP stage, real-data approval and other human gates remain open.
Builder evidence is compact, maps acceptance to artifacts/commands/limitations and notes no backend/UI/schema/API changes for this slice.
acceptance_mapping.note: Evidence markdown is 95 lines and machine evidence maps 11 acceptance items and 9 commands.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: UI/user-visible screenshot/browser evidence requirement is handled.
acceptance_mapping.reason: This slice created draft legal markdown artifacts only and changed no app UI route or rendered user-visible application surface.

The legal draft slice changes no backend, schema, Flyway migration, OpenAPI source or generated client artifact. Maven/Flyway/OpenAPI commands were not run because the verifier write scope is restricted to proof artifacts and this sprint has no backend/API build target.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: git diff --check excluding raw is clean or unrelated pre-existing issues are recorded honestly.
Harness validation result is evaluated honestly.
acceptance_mapping.reason: Harness bootstrap checks passed and stage-artifacts failed only because latest evidence is on MVP-03-legal-drafts-001 while latest verdict/problems aliases still point to MVP-03-closure-audit-001 before parent alias sync.

commands.command: node inline legal draft independent check
rg -n -i active cookie/tracking patterns apps packages

docs_sync.reason: The existing MVP stage/product docs already require legal drafts and privacy/legal guardrails. This slice adds draft legal artifacts only and does not change behavior, architecture, API contract, schema, setup/runtime workflow or a canonical decision.

ui_or_browser_evidence.reason: No UI or app-rendered user-visible surface changed in this docs/legal draft slice.

backend_schema_api_evidence.reason: No backend/schema/API/OpenAPI/generated-client change is part of MVP-03-legal-drafts-001.
backend_schema_api_evidence.repo_state_note: The current worktree contains unrelated pre-existing backend/OpenAPI/generated-client modifications outside this legal draft slice; this verifier did not certify those changes.

residual_risks: The four legal documents are drafts only and still require human legal/privacy review before production use or real employee/customer data processing.
Full MVP-03 and the MVP stage remain open.
Latest verdict/problems aliases still point to MVP-03-closure-audit-001; this verifier intentionally wrote immutable refs only and left parent alias sync to the orchestrator.
The worktree contains unrelated backend/API/generated-client changes from other MVP-03 work; they are outside this verifier scope.
